question: What are the names of lakes situated in countries through which the Natara River flows, with an area of less than 390,000 square kilometers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Lake)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:flowsThrough]-(m1:River {name: 'Natara'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.area_km2 < 390000 RETURN n.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (r:River)-[:flowsThrough]->(c:Country)-[:locatedIn]->(db:DrainageBasin)-[:partOf]->(l:Lake) WHERE l.area_km2 < 390000 RETURN DISTINCT l.name

question: What are the names of all countries?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Country) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country) RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS name

question: What is the difference in range, in kilometers, between the Antonov An-12 and the ATR 42?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:AircraftModel {name: 'Antonov An-12'}), (m0:AircraftModel {name: 'ATR 42'}) RETURN n.range_km - m0.range_km AS answer
pred_cypher: MATCH (a:AircraftModel) WHERE a.name IN ['Antonov An-12', 'ATR 42'] RETURN a.name, a.range_km ORDER BY a.name

question: What is the difference in vertical depth between Lake Sartlan and Lake Sasykkol?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Lake {name: 'Lake Sartlan'}), (m0:Lake {name: 'Lake Sasykkol'}) RETURN n.vertical_depth_m - m0.vertical_depth_m AS answer
pred_cypher: MATCH (l1:Lake {name: 'Lake Sartlan'})-[:locatedIn]->(), (l2:Lake {name: 'Lake Sasykkol'})-[:locatedIn]->() RETURN l1.vertical_depth_m - l2.vertical_depth_m AS depth_difference

question: Which countries have diplomatic relations with nations that Brazil also has diplomatic relations with, and how many such countries are there for each?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]-(m1:Country {name: 'Brazil'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (b:Country)-[:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(c:Country), (c)-[:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(br:Country) WHERE br.name = 'Brazil' RETURN c.name AS country, count(c) AS count_of_countries ORDER BY count_of_countries DESC

question: Provide the names of individuals who have served as board members for companies based in Russia, along with the count of such companies for each person.

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:hasBoardMember]->(c:Company)-[:basedIn]->(country:Country) WHERE country.name = 'Russia' RETURN p.name, count(c) AS company_count

question: What are the names of mountain ranges that include mountains located in India, and how many such mountains are part of each range?

question: What are the names of countries through which the Arauca River flows, and how many drainage basins are located in each of those countries?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r1:flowsThrough]-(m1:River {name: 'Arauca River'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:locatedIn]-(m0:DrainageBasin) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (r:River)-[:flowsThrough]->(c:Country), (r)-[:partOf]->(db:DrainageBasin)-[:locatedIn]->(c) RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS country_name, count(db) AS drainage_basins_count ORDER BY country_name

question: How many movies have either won the Amanda Award for Best Foreign Feature Film or feature Elijah Wood in their cast?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:receivesAward]->(m0:Award {name: 'Amanda Award for Best Foreign Feature Film'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Movie)-[r1:hasCastMember]->(m1:Person {name: 'Elijah Wood'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:receivesAward]->(a:Award) WHERE a.winners CONTAINS 'Amanda Award for Best Foreign Feature Film' WITH m MATCH (m:Movie)-[:hasCastMember]->(p:Person) WHERE p.name = 'Elijah Wood' WITH m UNWIND [m] AS movie RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT movie) AS total_movies

question: How many players have been part of either the Sacramento Kings or the Chicago Bulls at any time?

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Player)-[:playsFor]->(t:Team) WHERE t.name IN ['Sacramento Kings', 'Chicago Bulls'] RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS player_count

question: Which aircraft has a greater wingspan, the North American P-51 Mustang or the Boeing 737-500?

question: Identify the individuals who have served as CEOs of companies that, at some point, had Norman Welsh as their CEO, and specify the number of such companies for each individual.

question: How many teams are either part of the Southwest Division or have drafted Lucious Harris?

pred_cypher: MATCH (t:Team) WHERE t.partOfDivision->(:Division) OR (t.draftedPlayer) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS team_count

question: What are the names of organizations that have members who are also part of Team X, and how many such members do they have?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:memberOf]-(m0:Character)-[r1:memberOf]->(m1:Organization {name: 'Team X'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Character)-[:memberOf]->(org:Organization), (c)-[:memberOf]->(team:Organization {name: 'Team X'}) RETURN DISTINCT org.name, count(c) AS member_count

question: How many countries have released a movie that won the Sundance World Cinema Audience Award for Documentary?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:releasedIn]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:receivesAward]->(m1:Award {name: 'Sundance World Cinema Audience Award: Documentary'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:receivesAward]->(a:Award) WHERE a.name = 'Sundance World Cinema Audience Award for Documentary' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m.originatesFrom) AS country_count

question: Provide the names of all individuals who were founders of Viacom, along with the number of companies where each has served as CEO, either currently or in the past.
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r1:foundedBy]-(m1:Company {name: 'Viacom'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:hasCEO]-(m0:Company) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:foundedBy]->(c:Company) WHERE c.name = 'Viacom' RETURN DISTINCT p.name, COUNT((p)-[:hasCEO]->(:Company)) AS ceo_count

question: What are the names of positions held by politicians who have been members of the German Fatherland Party, and how many such politicians have held each position?

question: How many organizations are either based in Wall or have Janos Slynt as a member?

question: What are the names of rivers that flow into Dongting Lake, pass through the People's Republic of China, and are at least 800 kilometers long?

MATCH (r:River)-[:flowsInto]->(l:Lake {name: 'Dongting Lake'})
WHERE r.length_km >= 800
AND (r)-[:flowsThrough]->(c:Country)
RETURN DISTINCT r.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)-[:locatedIn]->(cont:Continent)-[:locatedIn]->(br:Country {name: 'Brunei'}) RETURN MIN(c.area_km2) AS smallest_area

question: Which aircraft model is longer, the Dash 7 or the Bell 206?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:AircraftModel {name: 'Dash 7'}), (m0:AircraftModel {name: 'Bell 206'}) RETURN CASE WHEN n.length_metre > m0.length_metre THEN n.name ELSE m0.name END AS answer
pred_cypher: MATCH (a:AircraftModel) WHERE a.name IN ['Dash 7', 'Bell 206'] RETURN a.name AS aircraft_model, a.length_metre AS length_metre ORDER BY a.length_metre DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of positions held by politicians who have headed The Patriots party, either currently or in the past?

question: How many more survivors were there on Noar Linhas Aéreas Flight 4896 compared to Air Moorea Flight 1121?

question: Which companies share board members with Boeing, and how many such shared board members does each company have?

pred_cypher:
MATCH (b:Company {name: 'Boeing'})
MATCH (c:Company)-[:hasBoardMember]->(p:Person)
MATCH (c2:Company)-[:hasBoardMember]->(p)
WHERE c2.name <> b.name
WITH c2, count(p) AS shared_board_members
RETURN c2.name AS company_name, shared_board_members ORDER BY shared_board_members DESC

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Character)-[:killedBy]->(jon:Character {name: 'Jon Snow'})-[:bornIn]->(l:Location) RETURN l.name AS location, count(l) AS character_count

question: List the names of all divisions in the Western Conference, along with the number of teams in each division.
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Division)-[r1:partOfConference]->(m1:Conference {name: 'Western Conference'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Division)<-[r0:partOfDivision]-(m0:Team) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (d:Division)-[:partOfConference]->(c:Conference) WHERE c.name = 'Western Conference' MATCH (t:Team)-[:partOfDivision]->(d) RETURN d.name AS division_name, COUNT(t) AS team_count

question: What are the names and launch years of operators that were involved in both TWA Flight 800 and TWA Flight 514?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Operator)<-[r0:operatedBy]-(m0:FlightAccident {name: 'TWA Flight 800'}),(n:Operator)<-[r1:operatedBy]-(m1:FlightAccident {name: 'TWA Flight 514'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.launch_year
pred_cypher: MATCH (f:FlightAccident {flight_number: 'TWA800'})-[:operatedBy]->(o:Operator), (f2:FlightAccident {flight_number: 'TWA514'})-[:operatedBy]->(o2:Operator) WHERE o = o2 RETURN DISTINCT o.name, o.launch_year

question: Who is the paternal grandfather of Socks Heeler?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)<-[r0:hasFather]-(m0:Character)<-[r1:hasFather]-(m1:Character {name: 'Socks Heeler'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (s:Character {birth_name: 'Socks Heeler'})-[:hasFather]->(f:Character)-[:hasFather]->(g:Character) RETURN g.birth_name AS paternal_grandfather

question: Provide the names of all players drafted by the Portland Trail Blazers, along with the number of teams each player has played for, whether currently or in the past.

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Player)-[:draftedBy]->(t:Team {name: 'Portland Trail Blazers'}) WITH p.name AS player_name, count(p) AS team_count MATCH (p:Player)-[:playsFor]->(team:Team) RETURN DISTINCT player_name, team_count

question: How many locations are there where a character was both born and died?

question: Which company, operating in both the phonographic and music industries, was launched first?

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:operatesIn]->(i:Industry) WHERE i.name IN ['phonographic', 'music'] RETURN DISTINCT c.name, c.launch_year ORDER BY c.launch_year ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of mountains located in Tajikistan, and how many countries is each of them situated in?

question: How many companies were either founded by Sergey Brin or have Jambool as a subsidiary?

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Company) WHERE c.foundedBy.some(p in [x IN (c.foundedBy) WHERE x.name = 'Sergey Brin']) OR (c.subsidiaryOf) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS company_count

question: What are the names of aviation accidents that either involve the L-410 Turbolet aircraft or depart from Ramón Villeda Morales International Airport?

pred_cypher:

UNION
MATCH (aa:FlightAccident)-[:departsFrom]->(a:Airport) WHERE a.iata_code = 'RMX' RETURN DISTINCT aa.flight_number AS flight_number

question: What are the names of rivers that either flow through Vietnam or have the Tongdian River as tributary?

pred_cypher: MATCH (r:River) WHERE r flowsThrough (c:Country) WHERE c.name = 'Vietnam' OR EXISTS((r)-[:flowsInto]->(t:River) WHERE t.name = 'Tongdian River') RETURN DISTINCT r.name

question: What are the names of movies that have won the Academy Award for Best Original Song and are part of Peter Jackson's Middle-earth film series?

MATCH (m)<-[:receivesAward]-(a:Award)
WHERE a.name = 'Academy Award for Best Original Song'
RETURN DISTINCT m.name

question: What are the names of movies either written by David Twohy or featuring Andreas Katsulas?

question: What is the difference in discharge rate in cubic meters per second between the Olyokma and Kasai River?

question: What is the difference in founding years between the G8 and the Australia Group?

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:hasGenre]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = 'high fantasy' MATCH (m)-[:directedBy]->(d:Person) RETURN DISTINCT d.name, d.date_of_birth

question: What are the names of awards received by movies released in Serbia, and how many such movies have received each award?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Award)<-[r0:receivesAward]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:releasedIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'Serbia'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

question: What are the names of film series that include movies released in France, and how many such movies are part of each series?

question: What are the unique genders of individuals who have served as both a board member and a CEO of a company at some point?

question: What are the names of characters who were killed by their own spouse, but are not war chiefs?

question: Which countries does a river that Polsky Buerak flows into pass through?

question: How many teams have either drafted Tom Hawkins or had George McCloud play for them at any time?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Team)<-[r0:draftedBy]-(m0:Player {name: 'Tom Hawkins'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Team)<-[r1:playsFor]-(m1:Player {name: 'George McCloud'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Player) WHERE p.name = 'Tom Hawkins' OR p.name = 'George McCloud' WITH p.name AS playerName, [t IN (CASE WHEN p.name = 'Tom Hawkins' THEN [t IN relationships(p, 'draftedBy')] ELSE [] END) + [t IN relationships(p, 'playsFor')] RETURN DISTINCT t WHERE t IS NOT NULL RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS teamCount

question: How many rivers are either part of the Tobol basin or flow into the Netva?

pred_cypher: MATCH (r:River) WHERE (r)-[:partOf]->(db:DrainageBasin) WHERE db.name = 'Tobol' OR (r)-[:flowsInto]->(o) WHERE o.name = 'Netva' RETURN COUNT(r) AS river_count

question: Which river is longer, Bandeya or Sultunka?

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:foundedBy]->(c:Company) WHERE c.name = 'Emmett Shear' AND p.date_of_birth > '1982-12-31' RETURN DISTINCT p.name

question: What is the name of the movie that was both produced and released in the same country and has the lowest global box office earnings?

question: Which countries have had a head of government who, at some point, held the position of President of the Party of European Socialists, and what are their founding dates?

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:producedBy]->(pc:ProductionCompany) WHERE pc.name = 'The Saul Zaentz Company' WITH m.name AS movie_name, m AS movie MATCH (m)-[:directedBy]->(d:Person) RETURN DISTINCT movie_name, COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS director_count

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Player)-[:receivesAward]->(a:Award) WITH a.name AS award_name, count(p) AS player_count RETURN award_name, player_count

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)-[:memberOf]->(io:InternationalOrganization) WHERE io.name = 'International Criminal Court' RETURN c.name, COUNT((c)-[:belongsTo]->(go:GovernmentOrganization)) AS government_organization_count

question: Who are the writers of the movie Life is Beautiful, listed from the most recently deceased to the earliest?

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Life is Beautiful'})-[:writtenBy]->(p:Person) RETURN DISTINCT p.name ORDER BY p.date_of_death DESC

question: Did On2 Technologies and LaCie start in the same year?

question: How many movies have either won the Academy Award for Best Sound Editing or been directed by Lana Wachowski?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:receivesAward]->(m0:Award {name: 'Academy Award for Best Sound Editing'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Movie)-[r1:directedBy]->(m1:Person {name: 'Lana Wachowski'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:directedBy]->(p:Person) WHERE p.name = 'Lana Wachowski' RETURN COUNT(m) + (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m2) FROM (MATCH (m2:Movie)-[:receivesAward]->(a:Award) WHERE a.name = 'Academy Award for Best Sound Editing' RETURN m2)) AS total_movies

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Character {birth_name: 'Kamala Khan'})-[:memberOf]->(o:Organization) RETURN DISTINCT o.name

question: What are the unique countries of citizenship of individuals who starred in movies that won the Critics' Choice Movie Award for Best Actress in an Action Movie?

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:writtenBy]->(w:Person), (m)-[:hasCastMember]->(a:Person) WHERE w.name = 'Cormac McCarthy' RETURN DISTINCT a.name AS actor_name, COUNT(a) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC

question: How many rivers either flow through the People's Republic of China or empty into Dongting Lake?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:River)-[r0:flowsThrough]->(m0:Country {name: 'People\'s Republic of China'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:River)-[r1:flowsInto]->(m1:Lake {name: 'Dongting Lake'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (r:River) WHERE r flowsThrough (c:Country) WHERE c.name = 'People's Republic of China' OR r flowsInto (l:Lake) WHERE l.name = 'Dongting Lake' RETURN count(r) AS river_count

question: What are the names of the divisions that include either the Atlanta Hawks or the Washington Wizards?

pred_cypher: MATCH (t:Team) WHERE t.name IN ['Atlanta Hawks', 'Washington Wizards'] RETURN DISTINCT (d:Division) WHERE (t)-[:partOfDivision]->(d) RETURN d.name

question: What are the names of continents where both Russia and Italy are located?

question: Which river has a greater discharge in cubic meters per second, Tokko or Tyukyan?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:River {name: 'Tokko'}), (m0:River {name: 'Tyukyan'}) RETURN CASE WHEN n.discharge_m3_s > m0.discharge_m3_s THEN n.name ELSE m0.name END AS answer
pred_cypher: MATCH (r:River) WHERE r.name IN ['Tokko', 'Tyukyan'] RETURN r.name AS river_name, r.discharge_m3_s AS discharge ORDER BY discharge DESC LIMIT 1

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Character)-[:hasMother]->(m:Character) WHERE m.birth_name = 'Rhaella Targaryen' MATCH (c)-[:hasFather]->(f:Character) RETURN DISTINCT c.birth_name AS character_name, COUNT(f) AS father_count

question: What is the name of the company, founded and once led by the same individual, that was launched the earliest?

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:writtenBy]->(p:Person) WHERE m.name IN ['Rocky Balboa', 'Creed'] OR (m:Movie)-[:hasCastMember]->(p:Person) WHERE m.name IN ['Rocky Balboa', 'Creed'] RETURN DISTINCT p.name

question: Who is the youngest individual who has been both a CEO and a board member of the same company at some point?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:hasCEO]-(m0:Company),(n:Person)<-[r1:hasBoardMember]-(m0:Company) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date_of_birth DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:hasCEO]->(c:Company)-[:hasBoardMember]->(p) RETURN p.name, p.date_of_birth ORDER BY p.date_of_birth ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of companies either founded by Owen D. Young or operating in the electronics industry?

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Company) WHERE c.foundedBy.some(p:Person WHERE p.name = 'Owen D. Young') OR c.operatesIn.some(i:Industry) RETURN DISTINCT c.name

question: What are the names of drainage basins located in Chile, and how many lakes are part of each?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)-[r1:locatedIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'Chile'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r0:partOf]-(m0:Lake) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (db:DrainageBasin)-[:locatedIn]->(c:Country) WHERE c.name = 'Chile' MATCH (db)<-[:partOf]-(l:Lake) RETURN db.name AS drainage_basin_name, count(l) AS lake_count

pred_cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:hasHomeVenue]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['Georgia Dome', 'Kiel Auditorium'] RETURN DISTINCT t.name

question: What are the names of politicians who have served as either the head of state or head of government of Germany, at any time?

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Politician)-[:hasHeadOfState]->(c:Country {name: 'Germany'}) OR (p:Politician)-[:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(c:Country {name: 'Germany'}) RETURN DISTINCT p.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (aa:FlightAccident)-[:involves]->(am:AircraftModel)-[:manufacturedBy]->(amf:AircraftManufacturer) WHERE aa.flight_number = 'Yeti Airlines Flight 103' RETURN DISTINCT amf.name, amf.launch_year

question: How many countries have either had Theodor Heuss as their head of state at some point or have the Federal Ministry of Finance as part of their government?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasHeadOfState]->(m0:Politician {name: 'Theodor Heuss'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Country)<-[r1:belongsTo]-(m1:GovernmentOrganization {name: 'Federal Ministry of Finance'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)-[:hasHeadOfState]->(p:Politician) WHERE p.name = 'Theodor Heuss' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c) + COUNT(DISTINCT (c)-[:leads]->(go:GovernmentOrganization)-[:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->()) AS total_countries

question: What are the names of players who were drafted by a team, sorted by their mass in kilograms from heaviest to lightest?

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Player)-[:draftedBy]->(t:Team) RETURN DISTINCT p.name, p.mass_kg ORDER BY p.mass_kg DESC

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Character)-[:hasMother]->(m:Character) WHERE c.fromUniverse.someProperty = 'World of Ice and Fire' RETURN DISTINCT c.birth_name AS character_name, count(m) AS mother_count ORDER BY character_name

question: Do FedEx Express Flight 14 and the 2021 Piedade de Caratinga Beechcraft King Air crash result in the same number of fatalities?

MATCH (a1:FlightAccident {flight_number: 'FedEx Express Flight 14'})
MATCH (a2:FlightAccident {flight_number: '2021 Piedade de Caratinga Beechcraft King Air'})
RETURN a1.number_of_deaths AS fatalities_fedex, a2.number_of_deaths AS fatalities_piedade, a1.number_of_deaths = a2.number_of_deaths AS same_number_of_fatalities

pred_cypher: MATCH (t:Team)-[:partOfDivision]->(d:Division)-[:partOfConference]->(c:Conference) WHERE EXISTS((t2:Team)-[:partOfDivision]->(d)) AND t.name = 'New Orleans Pelicans' RETURN DISTINCT t2.name

question: How many countries have either established diplomatic relations with Romania or have had Yitzhak Shamir as their head of government at some point?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(m0:Country {name: 'Romania'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Country)-[r1:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(m1:Politician {name: 'Yitzhak Shamir'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country) WHERE c.hasDiplomaticRelationWith(:Country {name: 'Romania'}) OR EXISTS((c)-[:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(p:Politician {name: 'Yitzhak Shamir'})) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS country_count

question: Which country has a larger area in square kilometers, Jordan or Paraguay?

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country) WHERE c.name IN ['Jordan', 'Paraguay'] RETURN c.name AS country, c.area_km2 AS area_km2 ORDER BY area_km2 DESC LIMIT 1

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:operatesIn]->(i:Industry {name: 'human resource management'})<-[:operatesIn]-(parent:Company)-[:subsidiaryOf]->(sub:Company) RETURN DISTINCT sub.name, c.launch_year

question: Provide the names of all individuals who are cast members in the movie Tomorrow Never Dies, along with the number of films each has written.
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r1:hasCastMember]-(m1:Movie {name: 'Tomorrow Never Dies'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:writtenBy]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Tomorrow Never Dies'})-[:hasCastMember]->(p:Person) RETURN DISTINCT p.name, COUNT(p) AS film_count

question: Provide the names of all countries that have diplomatic relations with Morocco, along with the number of countries each of them has diplomatic relations with.

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Country)-[:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(c:Country) WHERE m.name = 'Morocco' RETURN c.name AS country_name, COUNT(c) AS number_of_relations

question: Who are the directors of movies produced by WingNut Films?

question: Which mountain has a greater elevation, Gyachung Kang or Chamar?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Mountain {name: 'Gyachung Kang'}), (m0:Mountain {name: 'Chamar'}) RETURN CASE WHEN n.elevation_m > m0.elevation_m THEN n.name ELSE m0.name END AS answer
pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Mountain) WHERE m.name IN ['Gyachung Kang', 'Chamar'] RETURN m.name AS mountain, m.elevation_m AS elevation ORDER BY elevation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country, having diplomatic relations with a NATO member, was founded the earliest?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]-(m0:Country)-[r1:memberOf]->(m1:InternationalOrganization {name: 'NATO'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.founding_date ASC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (c1:Country)-[:hasDiplomaticRelationWith]->(c2:Country)-[:memberOf]->(io:InternationalOrganization) WHERE io.label = 'NATO' RETURN c1.name, c1.founding_date ORDER BY c1.founding_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many aviation accidents involved either Southwest Airlines as the operator or a Boeing 737 aircraft?

pred_cypher: MATCH (aa:FlightAccident)-[:operatedBy]->(o:Operator) WHERE o.name = 'Southwest Airlines' OR (aa:FlightAccident)-[:involves]->(am:AircraftModel) WHERE am.name = 'Boeing 737' RETURN count(aa) AS accident_count

pred_cypher: MATCH (f:Character)-[:hasFather]->(father:Character)-[:killedBy]->(child:Character) WHERE EXISTS((child)-[:killedBy]->(RamsayBolton:Character)) RETURN DISTINCT father.birth_name AS father_name, COUNT(child) AS children_killed_by_ramsay_bolton

pred_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:writtenBy]->(p:Person) WHERE m.name = 'Apollo 13' RETURN DISTINCT p.name, COUNT(m) AS movie_count

question: How many countries have had either Alcide De Gasperi as their head of government or Antonio Segni as their head of state at some point in time?

pred_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)-[:hasHeadOfState]->(p:Politician) WHERE p.name IN ['Alcide De Gasperi', 'Antonio Segni'] RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c.name) AS country_count UNION ALL MATCH (c:Country)-[:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(p:Politician) WHERE p.name IN ['Alcide De Gasperi', 'Antonio Segni'] RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c.name) AS country_count

question: How many characters are either killed by Burglar or married to Aunt May?

question: Identify the players who have received the same awards as Wilt Chamberlain, and specify how many of those awards each player has received.

pred_cypher:
MATCH (w:Player {name: 'Wilt Chamberlain'})-[:receivesAward]->(award:Award)
MATCH (p:Player)-[:receivesAward]->(award)

WITH p, count(award) AS award_count
RETURN DISTINCT p.name, award_count ORDER BY award_count DESC
